tool.name: parse_openapi_schema
tool.description:
Parse OpenAPI/Swagger schema and extract API structure.
Supports OpenAPI 2.0 (Swagger) and OpenAPI 3.x formats in JSON or YAML. Returns parsed schema with endpoints, parameters, and security requirements.
P3.6: API Schema Validation - Automatically discover API endpoints and their security requirements from OpenAPI specifications.

parameter.name: schema_url_or_data
parameter.description: URL to schema file or direct schema content (JSON/YAML). Can be https://example.com/openapi.json or raw JSON/YAML string.

tool.name: extract_api_endpoints
tool.description:
Extract testable endpoints from OpenAPI/Swagger schema.
Returns detailed endpoint information including paths, methods, parameters, and security requirements. Useful for automated API testing.
P3.6: Enables systematic API testing by extracting all endpoints from schema.

parameter.name: schema_url_or_data
parameter.description: URL to schema or direct schema content (JSON/YAML)

tool.name: analyze_security_requirements
tool.description:
Analyze security/authentication requirements from OpenAPI schema.
Identifies authentication schemes, authorization requirements, and security policies defined in the API schema. Helps identify insecure endpoints.
P3.6: Security analysis - find endpoints without authentication, OAuth scopes, API key requirements.

parameter.name: schema_url_or_data
parameter.description: URL to schema or direct schema content
